title: Context Window Budget Allocation Over a Long Session
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Token Efficiency
description: Stacked area chart of context window allocation over 200 turns, with compaction events.

learningObjectives: Implement a context window budget that maintains affordable per-turn cost across a session that exceeds 100 turns.
prerequisites: Chapter 16: context window components, compaction, sliding window, long-term memory

keyQuestions: How many compaction events does a 200-turn session trigger at threshold T?
What is the cost-fidelity tradeoff of the threshold knob?
When is sliding-window-only the right choice?
commonMisconceptions: Compaction is the same as forgetting
Threshold is purely a cost knob
